strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source platforms with real-world deployment (e.g., GISCollective)
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq, including MCP code generators
Strong full-stack engineering background with demonstrable expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data handling
concerns: Lack of explicit evidence of leading or scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people, critical for CTO role
No clear demonstration of production-grade multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Limited visibility into experience with financial infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, compliance) or hybrid outsourced engineering governance
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and emerging agentic tooling, with relevant hands-on AI-agent work — but lacks demonstrable experience in fintech-regulated environments, scaling senior engineering teams to 30+, and designing financial risk systems, which are core to the role’s mandate.
